questionHtml: Find the probability that the second ball chosen is labelled A, given that the first ball chosen was labelled N.
markschemeHtml:
38 0.375, 37.5%        (A1)(A1)   (C2)


Note: Award (A1) for correct numerator, (A1) for correct denominator.


[2 marks]
